title: Vanilla Strengthening
body:
### Vanilla optimized
Stand-alone local archive,12 Chunk,Quality fast
- Vanilla 120fps
- Optimized 1200fps
- Enable Iris 1100fps
- Enable Xaeros-Minimap 900fps
- Enable iris and Xaeros-Minimap 420fps  
`AMD Ryzen R5 3600x 6-Core Processor 4.28Ghz`  
`AMD Radeon R9 270`

*Since the pack is mainly for Chinese players, the language is set to Chinese by default, please understand if this may be inconvenient*
---

### 原版优化
单机本地存放，12区块，画质快
- 原版 120帧/秒
- 优化后 1200fps
- 启用Iris 1100fps
- 启用Xaeros-MiniMap 900fps
- 启用 Iris 和 Xaeros-MiniMap 420fps  
`AMD Ryzen R5 3600x 6-Core Processor 4.28Ghz`  
`AMD Radeon R9 270`
